differences.title: 1. Routing
differences.leftDesc: Nested routes, layouts, and error handling built-in.
differences.rightDesc: File-based routing with App Router & Pages Router.

differences.title: 2. Data Fetching
differences.leftDesc: Data loading on the server before render.
differences.rightDesc: Supports Server, Static, and Incremental Static Regeneration.

differences.title: 3. Mutations
differences.leftDesc: Leverages HTML forms and web standards for mutations.
differences.rightDesc: Handles mutations via API routes or Server Actions.

differences.title: 4. State Management
differences.leftDesc: Server state management is core to Remix.
differences.rightDesc: Relies more on client-side state management solutions.

differences.title: 5. Performance
differences.leftDesc: Focuses on shipping less JavaScript to the client.

differences.title: 6. Error Handling
differences.leftDesc: Dedicated error boundaries for routes and components.
differences.rightDesc: Error handling at app or page level.

differences.title: 7. Architecture
differences.leftDesc: Built on web standards and progressive enhancement.
differences.rightDesc: Opinionated React framework with Vercel backing.
